name: perception-6h
_phase_1_note: Inactive template. Activates after a Railway Python worker exposing /perception-tick is deployed (separate post-Phase-1 mini-phase). For the Phase 1 exit drill we trigger scripts/perception_tick.py manually from the dev venv.

nodes.name: Run perception_tick
nodes._comment: POST to perception_worker /perception-tick. method:POST is explicit — older n8n defaulted to GET when method was omitted, producing 404 not_found. For local-only drill, this node is skipped and scripts/perception_tick.py is run from venv.
